one_line: Universal retail ownership, near-unanimous analyst consensus, and Dow inclusion signal structural crowding; the -17% pullback cooled momentum (RSI 50) but did not unwind the crowd — they kept buying.
evidence: Crowded signals: rec_mean 1.43 across 13 analysts (near-unanimity); top-5 retail holding globally with reflexive auto-buy behavior unchanged through the drawdown; Dow addition = peak-consensus institutional event. Against-crowded: RSI 49.7 (momentum flushed, not at 70+ euphoria); -17% pullback from 404 to 334 shook out weak hands; Burry AI-short disclosure creates narrative wall of worry (GOOG not named but Mag7 sentiment hit). Tiebreaker: the crowd did not leave — retail auto-buys continued, analyst ratings held, no short squeeze pressure building. Pullback reset price and RSI, not positioning. CROWDED, not EXTREME (no parabolic RSI, no leverage/options frenzy signals in data provided).
